title: Galaxy Unpacked Search Trends Highlight Leaks on Foldables and Wearables
description: Recent search trends for 'galaxy unpacked' in Brazil indicate interest in leaks regarding new Samsung devices, including foldable phones and watches.

sources.title: Samsung Unpacked vazada: Galaxy Z Fold 8, Flip 8, Watch 9 e Ultra 2 surgem em novas cores
Galaxy Unpacked: o que esperar dos novos celulares dobráveis da Samsung?
Dobrável "em forma de passaporte" pode superar modelo comum da Samsung

sections.heading: Leaked Device Information
paragraphs: According to TudoCelular.com, information regarding Samsung Unpacked has been leaked. The report suggests that the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Galaxy Z Flip 8, Watch 9, and Ultra 2 may appear in new colors.

sections.heading: Expectations for Foldable Phones
paragraphs: UOL published coverage discussing what consumers can expect from Samsung's new foldable cellphones in relation to the Galaxy Unpacked event.

sections.heading: New Form Factor Rumors
paragraphs: Canaltech reported on a foldable device described as being in the shape of a passport. The article suggests that this model may surpass the common Samsung model.

sections.heading: Search Trend Context
paragraphs: The search term 'galaxy unpacked' has a reported lower bound of 500 searches in the region. Google Trends data highlights the popularity of specific queries during the snapshot period.

faq.q: Which devices are rumored to appear in new colors?
faq.a: According to TudoCelular.com, the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Galaxy Z Flip 8, Watch 9, and Ultra 2 are rumored to appear in new colors.

faq.q: What unique design did Canaltech mention?
faq.a: Canaltech reported on a foldable device shaped like a passport that may surpass the common Samsung model.

faq.q: What is the focus of the UOL article?
faq.a: The UOL article focuses on what to expect from Samsung's new foldable cellphones.
